maps.Mirage: Balanced aim-duel map. High-precision sightlines favor AWPers and high-HS riflers.
maps.Inferno: Utility-heavy and narrow. High spray frequency. Lowers HS potential but boosts raw Kills.
maps.Nuke: CT-Sided verticality. Quick rotations. Favors tactical crosshair placement and high intensity.
maps.Ancient: Jungle-themed. High foliage. Favor aggressive entry pathing and high-KPR firepower.
maps.Anubis: Re-added Jan 2026. Wide-open mid and fast rotations. T-Sided bias favors raw aggression.
maps.Dust 2: The aim-duel capital. Longest sightlines in the pool. Massive boost for AWPers.
maps.Overpass: Highly tactical. Long-range sightlines mixed with tight park chokes. High complexity.

team_styles.Team Spirit: Aggressive Entry/Methodical Support hybrid (donk/sh1ro). High-intensity academy system.
team_styles.Team Vitality: Structured individual dominance (ZywOo). High-precision system with elite spacing.
team_styles.FaZe Clan: Tactical Individualistic. Relies on mid-round magic and individual clutch ability.
team_styles.NAVI: Disciplined Methodical System. Highly structured play with balanced fire-power.
team_styles.G2 Esports: Flashy Aggression. Aggressive entry system paired with veteran sniping stability.

roles.Rifler: Primary engagement player. High volume of headshots and entry duels.
roles.AWPer: Sniper role. Focuses on center-of-mass kills. Naturally lower Headshot % but high survival.
